name: Amscot - The Money Superstore
description_short: Florida-based payday and installment loan lender offering fast cash ($100–$1,000) with no credit checks, open 365 days annually across multiple locations.
description_long: Amscot - The Money Superstore has operated in Florida since 1989, establishing itself as a primary short-term lending provider across the state. The company specializes in payday loans (cash advances up to $500) and installment loans ($100–$1,000), both available without credit checks and with same-day funding. Applicants can walk out with cash in hand within minutes of approval. Amscot is licensed by Florida's Office of Financial Regulation (OFR) and operates exclusively in Florida, which the company notes has "some of the strictest consumer-protection laws in the United States." The company is also a member of INFiN (Indigenous Finance Institutions Network) and adheres to its "Best Practices" standards. Beyond lending, Amscot positions itself as a "Money Superstore" by bundling additional financial services under one roof, creating convenience for customers seeking multiple transactions. However, the cost of borrowing is substantial: a $100 cash advance carries a $13 fee (10% plus $3 verification), equating to a 338.93% APR on a 14-day loan cycle. The Coral Gables location operates M–F 7 a.m.–9 p.m., Saturday 8 a.m.–8 p.m., and Sunday 9 a.m.–6 p.m., with many other locations open 24 hours. While the company emphasizes accessibility and speed for emergency cash needs, borrowers should understand that these products carry extremely high interest costs and are designed for short-term, emergency use only.
pros: No credit checks required for either payday or installment loans
Same-day cash funding — walk out with money in minutes after approval
Open 365 days per year, including weekends and holidays; many 24-hour locations
Offers installment loans up to $1,000, providing more borrowing capacity than typical payday loans
Multiple bundled services (check cashing, bill payment, money orders, wire transfers, notary, ATM) at single location
Licensed and regulated by Florida OFR; member of INFiN with adherence to best practices standards
Long operating history (since 1989) with established brand recognition in Florida
cons: Extremely high APR: 338.93% for a $100 payday loan on 14-day cycle; total cost of borrowing far exceeds typical personal loans
Cannot serve active military members or their spouses/dependents due to federal law restrictions
Limited geographic availability — operates only in Florida, unlike national competitors
Simple interest model without transparency on exact repayment schedules or installment payment breakdowns on website
Debt cycle risk: fast, high-cost loans designed for emergency use may encourage repeat borrowing at compounding costs
best_for: Unbanked or credit-challenged consumers needing immediate cash for unexpected emergencies without traditional loan approval
Florida residents who need same-day funding and have no access to credit cards, personal loans, or family support
Borrowers comparing payday loans versus overdraft fees or late bill penalties as a short-term bridge solution
Customers seeking multiple financial services (check cashing, money orders, bill pay) bundled in one convenient location
diagnosis: Amscot is appropriate for Florida residents facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who have exhausted other options (credit cards, bank loans, family) and understand the high cost. The critical caveat: payday and installment loans at Amscot carry APRs exceeding 300%, making them expensive emergency-only products—not sustainable financial solutions. Borrowers should exhaust alternatives first and repay quickly to avoid debt cycles.
services: Payday loans (cash advances) up to $500 with no credit check
Installment loans $100–$1,000 with no credit check and flexible repayment
